{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Wandering Titan appearance
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Wandering Titan]] is a massive humanoid figure made of dark stone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
